creator: mi@monsta.privatelabs.com
text:
The latest stable version, as listed in

	http://www.hpl.hp.com/personal/Hans_Boehm/gc/gc_source/recent_changes

	appears to be 5.3. The update is fairly trivial, but there is one
	place, where I'm not sure (marked by XXX in the port's Makefile).

	The place seems to apply only to non-i386 and the port is currently
	marked as i386 only anyway. Perhaps, it can be made cross-platform
	by resolving this small (?) issue.

	As part of polishing, I removed the stale mirror (at sgi.com)
	and added the WWW to pkg/DESCR.

Fix: cvs diff: Diffing .
